author: doll-agent
content: Implemented MT19937-64 BitGenerator in ferray-random::bitgen::mt19937. 312-word state, period 2^19937 - 1. Standard tempering pipeline. seed_from_u64 uses the canonical multiplier 6364136223846793005 to expand a single u64 into the full state. jump() and stream() return None — for stream parallelism use Philox or seed multiple instances via SeedSequence. Re-exported as ferray_random::MT19937. 4 unit tests cover determinism, seed-divergence, full range, and unit-interval f64 sampling.
